{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"202603211237444FC243729E6AF1C04B4C\"}"},"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7591011494350324505","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"主角陈凡的逆袭路径完全遵循“低谷崛起—逐层破局—巅峰引领”的经典爽文逻辑：从被诬陷开除的穷小子，到拿下关键地块、搞定本地反派，再到携手华鼎、莱茵财团，最终成为全球零碳领袖，每一章都有明确的“升级目标”与“打脸时刻”。这种“现实困境—技术破局—资源聚合”的闭环，既满足了读者对“爽感”的即时需求，又通过“因地制宜适配全球”“技术主权破壁垒”等情节，传递出实用理性的乐感文化内核。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1767423207,"group_id":"7590993016152656920","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3N0dLUp+gux9irAhNS1HloKuPLaShn1peB07TN/f9gs","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/fde3d3fe597a4e3bbdd2c34de40976fd~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776619988\u0026x-signature=sBbJxXZLDAK3awT2qfGVk4WefDI%3D","user_id":"1082360450004327","user_name":"春秋蝉鸣少年归Zz"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1082360450004327","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7590993016152656920","book_info":{"abstract":"新作品出炉，欢迎大家前往番茄小说阅读我的作品，希望大家能够喜欢，你们的关注是我写作的动力，我会努力讲好每个故事！男高周末或者放假才更新","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2oe96e4e213fe15c97af7b2610f8898244~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"春秋蝉鸣少年归Zz","author_id":"","book_id":"7590993016152656920","book_name":"都市从被开除到世界首富","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202828","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":261,\"na
